info.title: Hina local control plane
info.description: Loopback-only read control surface for the Hina core runtime.

200.description: Runtime readiness and bounded connection status.
Build and protocol versions.
Non-secret effective transport limits.
Bounded in-memory runtime metric snapshot.
Non-secret local model provider, circuit and live resource status.
Persona, memory and active text-turn status.
Accepted turn snapshot. Poll the turn resource for completion.
Current or terminal turn snapshot.
Interrupted or already-terminal turn snapshot.
Bounded successful short-term turn replay.
Cleared in-memory conversation window and relationship state.
Pinned STT provider, capture, VAD, queue and retention status.
Silence decision or real Vietnamese transcription with ordered events.

400.description: Malformed, unsupported or policy-invalid WAV input.

429.description: The bounded transcription admission queue is full.

503.description: The STT dependency, pinned model, resource lease or inference is unavailable.

200.description: Pinned Vietnamese TTS provider, output, queue and retention status.
Moderated Vietnamese speech as 48 kHz mono PCM16 WAV.

X-Hina-Alignment.description: JSON array of estimated chunk-boundary timings; not phoneme-accurate.

403.description: The entire utterance was blocked before audio generation.

409.description: The utterance identifier is already active.

429.description: The bounded synthesis queue is full.

503.description: The TTS dependency, pinned model, codec or inference is unavailable.

200.description: Cancellation was requested when the utterance was active.

400.description: The utterance identifier or request body is invalid.

200.description: Recent redacted structured error records.
Loaded capability manifest, operator safety state and verified audit head.
Recent hash-chained safety audit records.
Audited allow, ask or deny decision.
Effective operator safety state after the control request.
Sanitized text and signed sanitation evidence.
Bounded context bundle containing verified sanitized text only.
Fail-closed moderation decision for a named safety surface.

OperatorControlRequest.description: Action-specific strict fields are enforced by the runtime.
